title: Novi Pazar, Raška — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Novi Pazar, Raška: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Novi Pazar is a city in Raška with a population of 66,000. A multicultural city in southwestern Serbia, the cultural center of the Bosniak community with a rich Ottoman heritage and the nearby Studenica Monastery.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
